name: Heeros Oyj
summary: Heeros Oyj provides cloud-based financial management solutions. The company offers automated solutions for purchase invoice workflow, invoice OCR processing, e-invoicing, e-archiving, SEPA payments, payable and receivable ledgers, general ledger accounting, and mobile applications. It also provides implementation, training, and main user services. The company serves individual businesses and organizations, accounting firms, governments, and educational institutes. Heeros Oyj is headquartered in Helsinki, Finland.
